transcript: Woo! Good morning Solana! Assalamu alaykum. Oh man. Okay. If you're just as excited as I am to be here at Breakpoint 2025, it's a great time to be alive, I want you to say Solana on three. One, two, three! Oh man, that feels better than two coffees and a beer. Look, I'm telling you, 2025 has been an absolutely blockbuster year for the network. Everything from institutional adoption, ETF inflows and issuance, on-chain revenue, new developers that are on Solana. We are winning on every single front. Come on, let's make some noise. Let's go. Woo! That's right, that's right. You know, every year I tell myself that Breakpoint can't get any bigger and every single year Ellie proves me wrong. All right. So we're gonna start off Day 2 of Breakpoint very, very right. We have a very special fireside. In conversation with the founder of Loopscale, Mary Gooneratne, we also have the heaviest of heavy hitters. These two gentlemen need absolutely no introduction. They are the men, the myth, the legends. Please give a very warm Solana welcome to Raj, Toly, and Mary!

sources.title: DeFi Development Corp. Signs LOI with Loopscale to Boost Stablecoin & SOL Yield and Participate in Points Program
sources.snippet:
[Accessibility: Skip TopNav](https://www.globenewswire.com/www.globenewswire.com#maincontainer)

# DeFi Development Corp. Signs LOI with Loopscale to Boost Stablecoin & SOL Yield and Participate in Points Program

November 18, 2025 08:30 ET\| Source:
[DeFi Development Corporation](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/DeFi%2520Development%2520Corporation)DeFi Development Corporation

BOCA RATON, FL, Nov. 18, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- **DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV)** (the “Company”), the first public company with a treasury strategy built to accumulate and compound Solana (“SOL”), today announced that it has signed a Letter of Intent (LOI) with Loopscale, a modular, orderbook-based lending protocol on Solana. The LOI outlines the Company’s plan to deploy a portion of its SOL and stablecoin reserves into Loopscale’s lending and vault ecosystem to generate yield, participate in the platform’s Points program, and support long-term SOL Per Share (SPS) growth.

Under the LOI, DFDV intends to allocate part of its treasury to Loopscale vaults and lending markets. Loopscale’s stablecoin lending market currently offers yields in excess of 11%, and its SOL-denominated strategies present an opportunity for the Company to enhance onchain yield. These returns align with DFDV’s strategy of using stablecoin-based income to fund systematic share buybacks and incremental SOL accumulation, both of which support non-dilutive value creation and SPS growth

In addition to earning yield, the Company will also participate in Loopscale’s Points program. Points are awarded to users based on lending, borrowing, looping, and referral activity and may entitle participants to potential future rewards on the Loopscale platform. By engaging with the program, the Company gains an additional economic layer on top of its yield and buyback strategy.

**Loopscale as a Yield Partner**

- Loopscale is recognized for its orderbook-based lending market, which uses a novel architecture developed by the Loopscale team. As TVL grows, this design improves capital efficiency across DeFi and supports treasury-grade stablecoin deployments.
- Loopscale supports advanced collateral types, yield-enhancing strategies, and curated vaults, making it well-suited for a treasury-grade stablecoin deployment.
- Loopscale’s Points rewards program also provides an additional incentive layer for participation. Through the program, users earn points for lending, borrowing, looping, and referrals.

Market participants who join Loopscale through DFDV’s referral link can help advance the Company’s mission of accumulating SOL and increasing SPS. By using the referral link, users both access Loopscale’s yield and Points program and support DFDV’s long-term Solana-focused strategy. DFDV’s referral link: [https://loop.sl/i/L7inP](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=Ej6121eNTSY8dCea2pRKRie6ytoWr6RgwgZhwmvad7G6__RLvaUZ56JIp-MkgB--qHwkiliJKAmC4UXD9xkxBcoHn-9UsD40L1gbBq80XQQ=).  Learn more about Loopscale Points: [https://docs.loopscale.com/using-loopscale/points](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=Ej6121eNTSY8dCea2pRKRmaHs66z0aSVah-AihEjYtRVJeeMLYZ6ESApHv_KpTP71jjpuiHPNLIY0Vl7bybcpDm_lCz2vfWOSTBn9TwyxPIubdl2xyAegMvokI8s4U8wlpMdTQEQcWoAb6TGCORaUOoDOpwR32hR0d19okjc3Kc=). Learn more about Loopscale: [https://docs.loopscale.com/introduction/overview](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=Ej6121eNTSY8dCea2pRKRmaHs66z0aSVah-AihEjYtRKkLPmydbJQu_7g4rmEvbNtEosx9m9nwyDfRbKHi14pdG9u2_wz0gpWBB70qqgOJYEu-ms-OttEzoOp3JYe5Yyyid_zvRfqMDmyfgGUFL4thkRX1wFUlG-YRxhE2HzC-0=).

**About DeFi Development Corp.** DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) has adopted a treasury policy under which the principal holding in its treasury reserve is allocated to SOL. Through this strategy, the Company provides investors with direct economic exposure to SOL, while also actively participating in the growth of the Solana ecosystem. In addition to holding and staking SOL, DeFi Development Corp.

tags.impact_reason: An introductory speech and fireside chat featuring key Solana figures and Loopscale representatives provides a solid update on the ecosystem.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a corporate Treasury Vault as the semantic anchor because it physically represents the institutional funds from the Nasdaq-listed firm, DFDV. The story is about 'activating' this passive treasury, which I've visualized as glowing data streams—representing the Loopscale protocol—breaching the vault and connecting it to the on-chain world. I included the text 'DFDV', the firm's ticker symbol, diegetically laser-etched onto the vault door to directly link this traditional financial object to the specific publicly traded company in the headline, reinforcing the monumental bridge being built between Wall Street and crypto infrastructure.
visual_idea.description: A tight, macro shot focusing on the seam of the immense brushed titanium vault door. The texture of the meticulously milled metal is visible in sharp detail. From the dark, hairline crack between the door and its frame, an intensely bright, cyan-colored light spills out, hinting at the immense energy and data flow being unleashed from within. The contrast between the cold, solid, industrial metal and the ethereal, energetic light is the central focus.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A tight, macro shot, centrally focused, and symmetrically composed, completely filling the frame with texture. The subject is the seam of an immense brushed titanium vault door. The meticulously milled, cold, solid, industrial brushed titanium metal texture is visible in hyper-sharp detail. From the dark, hairline crack between the door and its frame, an intensely bright, ethereal, cyan-colored light spills out dramatically, hinting at immense energy and data flow being unleashed from within. The stark contrast between the cold, solid, industrial metal and the vibrant, energetic light is the central focus. Rendered with cinematic volumetric lighting, high dynamic range, high-contrast chiaroscuro, deep shadows, and reflective surfaces, embodying a sleek corporate futurism aesthetic. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, macro photography, detailed textures.

editorial.headline: Nasdaq Firm DFDV Activates Treasury on Loopscale Protocol
editorial.standfirst: Publicly traded DeFi Development Corp (Nasdaq: DFDV) commits its treasury to Loopscale's lending markets, validating the protocol's institutional grade. The move transforms Solana from a passive asset to an active yield generator for corporate balance sheets.
key_takeaways: DeFi Development Corp (Nasdaq: DFDV) signs LOI to deploy treasury reserves into Loopscale vaults.
Loopscale founder Mary Gooneratne joins Raj Gokal and Anatoly Yakovenko for a Day 2 fireside chat.
The strategy targets >11% stablecoin yields to fund share buybacks and drive 'SOL Per Share' growth.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The energy at Breakpoint Day 2 is palpable, but the real signal is cutting through the noise. While the opening remarks celebrated a "blockbuster year" of ETF inflows and adoption, the presence of **Loopscale** founder **Mary Gooneratne** alongside **Raj Gokal** and **Anatoly Yakovenko** underscores a critical shift: the maturation of Solana DeFi into institutional-grade infrastructure. The stage is set not just for celebration, but for the unveiling of a new operating model for corporate finance on-chain.

The catalyst for this shift is the newly announced Letter of Intent from **DeFi Development Corp (Nasdaq: DFDV)**. This partnership serves as a live proof of concept for the "active treasury" thesis. DFDV is moving beyond a passive holding strategy; they are deploying SOL and stablecoin reserves into **Loopscale**'s fixed-rate, orderbook-based lending markets. With stablecoin yields currently exceeding 11%, the firm intends to use this on-chain revenue to fund systematic share buybacks and accumulate incremental SOL, creating a flywheel for their "SOL Per Share" (SPS) metric.

Why **Loopscale**? Unlike traditional AMM-based lending pools, **Loopscale**’s modular, orderbook architecture offers the precise risk management and capital efficiency required by a public reporting company. The protocol's ability to match borrowers and lenders directly allows for fixed-term, fixed-rate contracts, eliminating the interest rate volatility that often deters corporate treasurers. By participating in **Loopscale**’s Points program and yield strategies, **DFDV** is effectively treating the protocol as a backend for its capital allocation strategy.

This move sets a precedent for how public companies can utilize Solana not just as an asset class, but as a yield-bearing operating system. As the fireside chat unfolds, the conversation pivots from abstract "adoption" to concrete "integration"—demonstrating that the infrastructure is now robust enough to support the balance sheets of Nasdaq-listed entities.
